title: Tamarind Stir Fry
description: A Japanese-inspired stir fry dish featuring the unique flavor of tamarind. This recipe serves as a delicious and easy meal option.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it begins to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced bell pepper and carrots, and continue to cook for another 4-5 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the tamarind paste, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the cooked vegetables back into the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the stir fry to a serving platter and garnish with chopped green onions.
Serve immediately over steamed rice or noodles.
